phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is live music tonight at the guinguette
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il de la musique live ce soir à la guinguette ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL duh lah moo-ZEEK LYVE suh SWAR ah lah gan-GET
phrases.cultural_note: Guinguettes are open-air riverside dance halls and bars. The Loire banks at Tours host several popular guinguettes active in summer, often with live accordion, jazz, or world music.

responses.english: You need to check on site.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a glass of local rosé wine
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais un verre de rosé de Touraine, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY un VAIR duh roh-ZAY duh too-REN, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Guinguettes are strongly associated with drinking local wine in a relaxed setting. Touraine rosé (light and fruity) is a classic guinguette drink.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is food or just drinks
phrases.text_local: Servez-vous de la nourriture ou seulement des boissons ?
phrases.pronunciation: sair-VAY-voo duh lah noo-ree-TOOR oo SUL-mahn day bwah-SON
phrases.cultural_note: Many guinguettes serve simple food — grilled meats, salads, and bread — alongside drinks. Some are bar-only; menus vary by establishment.

responses.phonetic: ohn ah oh-SEE day PLAHNSH ah par-tah-ZHAY
responses.local: On a aussi des planches à partager.

phrases.intent_en: Ask until what time the guinguette is open
phrases.text_local: Jusqu'à quelle heure la guinguette est-elle ouverte ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhoos-KAH kel UR lah gan-GET ay-TEL oo-VAIRT
phrases.cultural_note: Guinguettes typically close around midnight in summer. They operate primarily May through September on weekends and public holidays.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to sit to watch the sunset over the Loire
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on s'asseoir pour regarder le coucher de soleil sur la Loire ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON sah-SWAR poor ruh-gar-DAY luh koo-SHAY duh soh-LAY soor lah LWAR
phrases.cultural_note: The terraces of the Loire guinguettes face west, making them ideal for watching the sun set over the river in summer evenings.
